equivalents_en: a d and a z are pronounced together
equivalents_sw: this sound often corresponds to j in Swahili

senses.definition_en: a d and a z are pronounced together
senses.definition_sw: this sound often corresponds to j in Swahili
senses.definition_dg: Arufu mbiri zinazolamikpwa phamwenga, d na z, kuhenda sauti moja ya Chidigo.

examples.dg: Dz ni sauti ya Chidigo ambayo si Chiswahili.
examples.en: Dz is a Digo sound that doesn't exist in Swahili.
examples.sw: Dz ni sauti ya Kidigo ambayo haipo katika Kiswahili.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kulinganisha vitu viiri, mana yache ni 'kama'.

examples.dg: Nyumba hino ni kulu dza ya jumbe.
examples.en: This house is big like the chief's.
examples.sw: Nyumba hii ni kubwa kama ya jumbe.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kulinganisha vitu viiri, mana yache ni 'kama'.

examples.dg: Mwanawe ni mure dza babaye.
examples.en: His child is tall like his father.
examples.sw: Mtoto wake ni mrefu kama baba yake.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mimea ya tsakani inayomera phatu phenye uvungo.

examples.dg: Dzadza ni mimea inayomera phatu pha madzi.
examples.en: Dzadza is a plant that grows in wet areas.
examples.sw: Mkongwa ni mmea unaomea sehemu za maji.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama ya ndani inayotuluka bada ya mwana kuvyalwa, kondo.

examples.dg: Dzadzo rinatuluka bada ya mwana kuvyalwa.
examples.en: The placenta comes out after the baby is born.
examples.sw: Kondo la nyuma linatoka baada ya mtoto kuzaliwa.

senses.definition_en: although, at least, even if (short form of hata dzagbwe)
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa kukala hata kama chitu chikahendeka, bado kuna chitu chanjina.

examples.en: Although he is sick, he still goes to work.
examples.sw: Ingawa ni mgonjwa, bado anakwenda kazini.

senses.definition_en: rubbish dump, place where trash is thrown and burned

examples.en: The thumb hurts because it was hit by a hammer.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho chinahendeka ama chinagombwa, dzambo ra muhimu.

examples.en: This problem is hard and it can't be solved

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa kukala chitu richikala rikadze kuhendeka bado.

examples.dg: Kpwa kpweli kala sidzangbwefika Nairobi bii

examples.en: This tree is enormous, it is bigger than all other trees.
examples.sw: Mti huu ni mkubwa kupita kiasi, ni mkubwa kuliko miti yote.

senses.definition_dg: Kudzifundza mutu mwenye, bila mutu wanjina kukufundza.

examples.dg: Nadzibaza Chidigo kpwa kusoma vitabu.
examples.en: I am teaching myself Digo by reading books.
examples.sw: Najifunza Kidigo kwa kusoma vitabu.

senses.definition_dg: Kudzisifu mwenye, kudzihendza ni muhimu kupita atu anjina.

examples.en: Don't boast, because people will despise you.
examples.sw: Usijidai, kwa sababu watu watakuchukia.

senses.definition_dg: Kudziika dzulu ya atu anjina, kudzitukuza.

examples.dg: Usidzienule mbere za atu anjina.
examples.en: Don't exalt yourself before other people.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphaha maarifa kpwa kusoma ama kpwa kufundzwa.

examples.dg: Mwana nkudzifundza kusoma na kuandika.
examples.en: The child is learning to read and write.
examples.sw: Mtoto anajifunza kusoma na kuandika.

senses.definition_dg: Kudziika phatu ambapho atu anjina taakuona.

examples.dg: Mwana akadzifwitsa nyuma ya muhi.
examples.en: The child hid himself behind the tree.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika mzigo ama chitu dzulu ya chitswa.

senses.definition_dg: Kudziphira moyo, kukala jasiri na kushinda wasiwasi.

equivalents_sw: a kind of bird with a narrow

senses.definition_sw: a kind of bird with a narrow, hammer-
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyama wa kuruka ariye chitswa chikulu dza nyundo.

examples.dg: Dzuni-bananga anaishi kanda-kanda ya madzi.
examples.en: The hamerkop lives near water bodies.
examples.sw: Nyoni huyu anaishi kando kando ya maji.

sub_entries.definition_sw: aina ya ndege mwenye kichwa chembamba mfano wa nyundo

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na wasiwasi wa kukala atu anakuangaliya ama anakugomba vibaya.

examples.dg: Usidzuphi, tahuna mutu anayekuangaliya.
examples.en: Don't be paranoid, no one is watching you.
examples.sw: Usiwe na wasiwasi, hakuna mtu anayekuangalia.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha dzulu, phenye kimo kire.

examples.dg: Ika chitu hicho dzuru ya meza.
examples.en: Put that thing on top of the table.
examples.sw: Weka kitu hicho juu ya meza.

senses.definition_dg: Nyenyezi kulu inayotupha mwanga na joto kpwa mtsana.

examples.dg: Proverb: Atsumaye dzuwani arya pephoni
examples.en: He who works hard in the sun will eat in the shade
examples.sw: Aanikaye juani hula kivulini.

senses.definition_dg: Wakati wa dzambarau, wakati dzuwa rinatswira.

examples.dg: Dzuwa ra kutswa, atu anauya kula kazini.
examples.en: In the evening, people return from work.
examples.sw: Jioni, watu wanarudi kutoka kazini.

senses.definition_dg: Siku mbiri kabla ya rero, bada ya dzana.

examples.dg: Dzuzi hwakutana na Sudi sokoni.
examples.en: The day before yesterday we met Sudi at the market.
examples.sw: Juzi tulikutana na Sudi sokoni.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu mdide ambaye anadzenga utandzi wa kuiha wadudu anjina.

examples.dg: Dzwidzwidzwi waika utandziye phepini pa dirisha.
examples.en: The spider built its web at the corner of the window.
examples.sw: Buibui aliweka utando wake pembeni ya dirisha.
